name: Netflix Methods
description: Access Netflix via EM, C2P, and Privatizing strategies.
long_description:
🛠️ Netflix Methods:
- Netflix C2P: Change owner mail to your own.
- Netflix EM: Get an invite without touching the owner's mail.
- Manual Privatize: Convert public Netflix cookies into private ones.
price:
- Netflix C2P: $3
- Netflix EM: $1
- Manual Privatize: $1.5
requirements:
✅ VPN recommended.
✅ Basic familiarity with Netflix cookies.

name: GPT Invite Trick
long_description:
🧠 GPT Invite Trick:
- Invite is sent to your own mail.
- It works based on luck only.

- Same as Netflix lifetime method.
requirements:

✅ Results may vary (luck-based).

name: Spotify Methods
description: Simple Spotify invitation and conversion tricks.
long_description:

- C2P: Convert account from owner's mail to your own.

name: Hotstar Method
description: Convert other Hotstar accounts to yours.
long_description:
